name: Applesauce-Raisin Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the vegetable oil and sugar together until light and fluffy.
2. Add the egg to the mixture and beat well until combined.
3. Stir in the vanilla extract.
4. Blend in the unsweetened applesauce.
5. Gradually mix in the whole wheat flour, unbleached flour, baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon, cloves, rolled oats, and raisins until just combined.
6. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto a lightly oiled baking sheet.
7. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 10 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
8. Remove from the oven and let cool on a wire rack.
Note: Each cookie serves as one serving, which is equivalent to half a fruit exchange and half a fat exchange. The nutritional information for each cookie is approximately 56 calories, 10 grams of carbohydrates, 1 gram of protein, 2 grams of fat, 47 milligrams of sodium, 49 milligrams of potassium, and 11 mg of cholesterol.
